narrative:
Steubenville Twp township has 2,555 registered voters, with 61.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.4 percentage points.
